---
title: "Your Proposal Title Here"
---

<!-- PROJECT SUMMARY – 1 PAGE MAXIMUM
     Required elements per NSF PAPPG:
       - Overview of proposed activity
       - Statement of objectives and methods
       - Significance of the proposed activity
       - Separate Intellectual Merit paragraph
       - Separate Broader Impacts paragraph

     Some solicitations require additional elements (e.g., host site info
     for fellowship programs). Check your solicitation's requirements.

     Keep to one page. Research.gov will reject summaries exceeding
     the page limit. -->

### Overview

TODO: Write a concise overview of the proposed research. Include the
research context, objectives, methods, expected outcomes, and
significance. This should be understandable to a scientifically literate
reader outside your subfield.

### Intellectual Merit

TODO: Describe the potential to advance knowledge within and across
fields. What fundamental questions does this address? What is novel
about the approach? Why is the PI well-positioned to conduct this work?

### Broader Impacts

TODO: Describe the potential to benefit society and contribute to
desired societal outcomes. Consider impacts on education, broadening
participation, infrastructure, and public engagement.

<!-- Optional: Some solicitations request keywords. Delete if not needed. -->
**Keywords:** TODO: keyword1; keyword2; keyword3
